description: RepoScout'tan WorldScope'a entegre edilen repolar. Bu dosya takip amaçlıdır.

integrated.note: Native TS client, not the Python lib
Global CO2 intensity - 80+ countries, fills gap beyond EU/US/UK
First ransomware-specific feed, public JSON API
Live GPS/SAR interference from Sentinel-1 satellite - upgrades static gps-jamming.ts
League standings and match results - complements ESPN live scores
Market screener - top gainers/losers/crypto movers, no individual price API provides this
Major index batch quotes - S&P 500, NASDAQ, DAX, FTSE, Nikkei, BIST 100

skipped_with_reason.ccxt/ccxt: Crypto exchange trading - out of scope for read-only intel platform, already have 4 crypto price APIs
skipped_with_reason.fawazahmed0/exchange-api: Forex rates already covered by exchangerate.ts, frankfurter.ts, argento-fx.ts
skipped_with_reason.typicode/json-server: Dev tool, not a data source
skipped_with_reason.trpc/trpc: API framework, not a data source
skipped_with_reason.swar/nba_api: Python only, ESPN already covers NBA
skipped_with_reason.openfootball/football.json: Static historical data, ESPN covers live
skipped_with_reason.airbnb/visx: Viz lib - conflicts with shadcn/ui architecture
skipped_with_reason.tremorlabs/tremor-npm: Dashboard lib - conflicts with existing stack
